name: stz-f
description: STZ Foundry: a full interactive pipeline (elicit, research, validate, standards, tests, slice) feeding per-slice adversarial tournaments. N specimens implement a contract in parallel, a frozen sealed suite plus a layered hack detector gate them, pairwise LLM judges rank the survivors, and a replayable markdown audit trail records every decision. Evolution of slice-tournament-zoo with a standalone BYO-LLM foundry runner.
